data.mapRoles:
- groups:
  - system:bootstrappers
  - system:nodes
  rolearn: arn:aws:iam::xxxxxxxxxxxx:role/nudgebee-dev-node-role
  username: system:node:{{EC2PrivateDNSName}}
- groups:
  - system:bootstrappers
  - system:nodes
  rolearn: arn:aws:iam::xxxxxxxxxxxx:role/KarpenterNodeRole-nudgebee-dev
  username: system:node:{{EC2PrivateDNSName}}
data.mapUsers:
- groups:
  - system:bootstrappers
  - system:nodes
  - system:masters
  userarn: arn:aws:iam::xxxxxxxxxxxx:user/random
